race.comment: HORCRUX (13) led but was gunned down late over this track and trip 42 days ago. The form out of that race has worked out well and this looks to shape similarly. He drops in weight as this is a little tougher, but he'll be fitter again and Pike hops on board. Can sit handy and make every post a winner. IMMORTAL BLISS (3) was too good over this track and trip 21 days ago in his first run for the new stable. The wide draw this time is a query, but he made his name being a get-back-run-on sprinter early in his career. Fiore remains in the saddle and while he rises in weight, he can continue his winning ways. TIMELESS GEM (10) got a long way back and didn't feature, ending up 3.3L off the winner. Brad Parnham remains in the saddle and his effort here second-up was very strong. Maps nicely and can bounce back. KING ADVISO (9) was strong from the front first-up and can't be discounted despite the wide alley. RISSOLES (6) was too good first-up and it wouldn't surprise to see her go on with it.
